<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/RV1jaHSkAvU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Description
**Hello there. Welcome to "The Void: Reawakened"** which is a mod pack heavily inspired by WaifuDestiny's Into The Fog mod pack on curseforge! This mod pack improves aspects of what Into The Fog originally had excluding some mods that just didn't fit the criteria I had for this mod pack and improves it all in different ways from an entire custom world with lore for you to uncover as to what this mod pack is truly about.

![Warning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cfca78c32255373b0854419023c7d75f3faa2e8.png)
This mod pack features mods that may be triggering to some people, this mod pack includes themes of
* Self Harm - Mainly present in the custom lore world.
* Hemophobia - The fear of gore/blood.
* Arachnophobia - The fear of spiders.
* Arthrophobia - The fear of worms, centipedes and other pests.
* Scopophobia - The fear of being watched.
* Nyctophobia - The fear of the dark.

There's a lot of jumpscares present so if you're light hearted please do not play this mod pack.

# Modpack

This mod pack took inspiration from the following mods, modpacks and content creators.
* **[Calvin](https://www.youtube.com/@Calvin9000)**'s [From The Fog](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLPxI_3T-Qkriwp9SDH-rki_0tWLlwPdBe) and [Broken Script](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLPxI_3T-QkrjX0VAgCfjB1Lj2oG8cCeUc) series.
* **[NotVixios](https://www.youtube.com/@notvixios)**'s [Paranormal Forest](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FcHYOFeaneA&t=169s) video.
Original creator of the Paranormal Forest is [One Last Time](https://www.youtube.com/@OneLastTimeMC/featured)
* **[The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script)**
* **[WaifuDestiny's Into The Fog](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/wds-into-the-fog)**
* **[Dread Modpack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/dread-arrenek)**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

For starters this mod pack has A LOT of spiders and different disgusting creatures present in it such as [The Cave Dweller](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dweller-evolved), [Siren Head](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/siren-head-the-arrival), [The Disturbed](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/disturbed) and just a lot of weird creatures that may or may not hunt you down as you take on your adventures in this mod pack.

There's a lot of quality of life mods in the mod pack that just make the game more fun and better to play.

</details>

You've awakened in yet another strange world but this time it's different... you feel the sense that you may not be alone in here, this presence may not be a good one. Be careful, the rift deepens and each crack that strengthens causes them to be more aggressive. . .

![Multiplayer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a89d9fb30623e401b15ccf9937b1e4e9f583a53.png)
This mod pack is not exactly meant to be played in Multiplayer as some mods may be very buggy and just completely break causing the user's experience to be completely ruined so please try to stay off of Multiplayer if you can however if you'd like to play with your friends then I won't stop you, Essential is already installed on the mod pack.

-Bunni
